creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
(In reply to Mathieu Arnold from comment #1)

I guess I have to take your word for it, as you maintain and commit this port.

But to me, and I presume to many, this message is telling "you should think twice before installing this port, as software it provides has _already_ reached end of life, and port itself will be removed on or after 2021-12-31."

Perhaps it would be clearer, and more correct, if Makefile line for deprecated was:

DEPRECATED=   EOL date 2021-12-31, please migrate to a newer version of BIND9 until then

Regards,
